description_long: This is a rectangular, metal street cabinet with a slightly rounded top and two front doors, each featuring horizontal ventilation grilles. The cabinet is painted a muted gray-green color and has a robust, industrial appearance. A prominent latch mechanism is mounted at the center of the front doors, suggesting secure access. The sides of the cabinet are plain, with visible hinge hardware and rivets along the edges. The base of the cabinet appears to be flush with the ground, and there are no visible warning labels or signage. The overall construction suggests it is designed to house electrical or communication equipment in an urban environment.
description: A sturdy, gray-green metal street cabinet with double front doors, ventilation grilles, and a central latch. Industrial and secure, it is designed for urban utility use.
description_view_0: Front view showing double doors with ventilation grilles and a central latch.
description_view_1: Side view displaying plain paneling, visible hinges, and rivets along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without a latch, showing the back of the doors and ventilation grilles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing plain paneling, hinges, and rivets.
